meta.scope: foot -> last allowances for GYW men's dress shoes, snug dress fit, calf leather (WORKFLOW §S1.2 is the authority of record).
meta.caveat: last_creation.md §6 notes free sources suggest ADDITIVE girth allowances (feather-edge + instep fill-up) rather than reductions; WORKFLOW's dress-fit defaults below stand until calibrated against a physical sample (that calibration run is expected and valuable).

round.rationale: WORKFLOW: round 15-18; last_creation §6: 3DShoemaker builds ~17 longer than foot for round toes

square.rationale: square treated in the chisel band unless elongated

elongated_extra.rationale: elongated square/chisel reach 25-35 total (WORKFLOW); extra is style-zone only

ball.rationale: dress fit: last ball girth ≈ foot +0 to -5; leather stretch absorbs snugness (WORKFLOW §S1.2)

waist_mode.rationale: waist scales with ball; -3 option for beveled-waist aesthetic (not used for derby-plain-uk9)

seat_width.rationale: seat width = foot heel width -2 to -4 (WORKFLOW §S1.2)

tread_width.rationale: last tread width ≈ foot tread width at F fitting; fitting steps handled in sizing table

single_leather_5mm.rationale: WORKFLOW: 8-12 mm for 5 mm leather sole

double_leather_9mm.rationale: extrapolated; flag as estimate if used

toe_box_min_height_mm.rationale: minimum toe-box height above toe tips at the toe line (WORKFLOW §S1.4 hard floor)

tolerances_mm.rationale: SATRA-informed defaults (WORKFLOW §S1.3); changed only by human edit

application.rationale: reference foot table already reflects socked dress fit per WORKFLOW anchor; stack applied only for bespoke measured feet (last_creation §6)
